needs.summary: List trader payout accounts (one Paystack subaccount per business) with bank details, subaccount/NUBAN-resolution status, and per-account settlement aggregates; searchable, filterable, and paged per admin table convention ({data, page, total}).
fields: nuban (should arrive masked or role-gated; dashboard currently receives the full 10-digit NUBAN and masks client-side, page.tsx:25-27)
settledMonthKobo (settled to trader in current month, integer kobo)
pendingSettlements (count of payments received but not yet settled by processor)
needs.filters/actions: Free-text search across businessName, bankName, accountName (page.tsx:104-114); status filter all|active|pending|failed (page.tsx:41-48, 159-164). Read-only monitor surface, no mutations on this screen.

needs.summary: Aggregate payout/settlement health stats for the four header cards. Currently computed client-side by reducing the full fixture array (page.tsx:92-102); once the list is paginated the backend must supply these totals directly.
fields: settledToTradersMonthKobo (current calendar month sum of settledMonthKobo)
failedAccountResolutionCount (accounts with status=failed, i.e. NUBAN could not be verified)
needs.filters/actions: Implicit current-calendar-month window for settledToTradersMonthKobo (the UI sub-label hardcodes 'July 2026', page.tsx:132). No other filters.
